records.m_Talk_ENG: Divide the forces into three. Deploy an assault squad at the front, and keep the middle and rear in tight formation.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Last time was a bit boring, so this time you'd better fight like your lives depend on it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Raise your swords and spears high! Let the pride of chivalry shine!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Raise your swords and spears high! Let the pride of chivalry shine!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Raise your swords and spears high! Let the pride of chivalry shine!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it gets boring, I might just crush little Aquarius to death!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it gets boring, I might just crush little Aquarius to death!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it gets boring, I might just crush little Aquarius to death!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blue Shift!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blue Shift!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blue Shift!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Red Shift?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Red Shift?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Red Shift?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Charge!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Charge!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Charge!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's all go die together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's all go die together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's all go die together.
